nasb.text: and the rich man is to glory in his humiliation, because like flowering grass he will pass away.

esv.text: and the rich in his humiliation, because like a flower of the grass he will pass away.

cnv.text: 富足的也不應該以降卑為辱；因為他如同草上的花，必要過去。

ccb.text: 富有的弟兄降卑，也要快乐，因为他会像花草一样衰残。

csbs.text: 富有的应当以自己被降卑而夸耀，因为他将要像草上的花那样消逝。
